author: anon-a7c6025f
content: Plan: Add RoPEConvention enum (Interleaved/HalfRotation). Add convention field to RotaryPositionEmbedding, new with_convention() constructor. Update apply() to dispatch on convention — Interleaved pairs (x[2i],x[2i+1]), HalfRotation pairs (x[i],x[i+d/2]). Default Interleaved preserves existing behavior. Add tests for both conventions.
